name: Python Quality Gate
description: Check Python code quality before writing

then.prompt: If writing a Python file, verify: 1) All functions have type hints (params + return). 2) No print() statements (use logger). 3) No except: pass or bare except. 4) No mutable default arguments. 5) No hardcoded credentials or ARNs. 6) Pydantic models used for input validation. If issues found, fix before writing.
